text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before the Arima Kinen, Seiun Sky's
grandfather comes to the academy to support
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being like a storm in human form, he leaves a
strong first impression on me, and I can tell how
much Seiun Sky loves him.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later while training, Special Week and Grass
Wonder, who will also be racing in the Arima
Kinen, stop by to offer their encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky tries to get them to spill their strategies
for the upcoming race, but there's no getting past
Grass Wonder's defenses. Things are getting more
interesting in the lead-up to the race.
